parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are an expert AI image prompt engineer. Transform the following idea into a highly detailed, professional image generation prompt.

Style: ' + (($json.body.style || 'realistic')) + '
Mode: ' + (($json.body.mode || 'none')) + '
Camera angle: ' + (($json.body.angle || 'none')) + '

User idea: ' + ($json.body.prompt || '') + '

Rules:
- Write in English
- Add rich visual details: lighting, composition, colors, textures, atmosphere
- Add technical quality terms: resolution, rendering style, artistic quality
- Keep the core subject and intent of the original idea
- Output ONLY the enhanced prompt, no explanation, no quotes, no markdown
- Length: 2-4 sentences maximum' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7, maxOutputTokens: 512 } }) }}
